meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell (Beginner Idea List)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve tutorial hell
content.seo_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome tutorial hell. A Beginner-level Idea List using Antigravity and Claude Code to accelerate SaaS launches.
content.answer_block: Tutorial hell ends when you stop watching and start shipping. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transition from passive consumption to active production. This workflow automates boilerplate, enforces architectural standards, and forces you to build functional, monetizable features instead of endless, disconnected code snippets that lead nowhere.
content.intro:
The screen glows with another 'Hello World' tutorial, but the void in your product roadmap remains. You have spent weeks consuming content, yet your SaaS dashboard is still a blank canvas. This is the silent killer of ventures: the comfort of learning without the friction of building.

Today, we pivot. We are moving from the spectator's seat into the architect's office. By configuring Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your development environment into an autonomous partner, capable of scaffolding production-ready code while you focus on the business logic that actually drives revenue.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish a clean, robust directory structure that follows industry standards for scalable SaaS applications.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a production-ready project boilerplate for a SaaS application using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Include a modular folder structure for components, services, and hooks.

steps.title: Database Schema Definition
steps.description: Define your data models to ensure your product has a solid foundation for user management and subscription data.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a SQL schema for a user subscription model, including tables for profiles, plans, and active_subscriptions. Ensure RLS policies are included.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'create database migration for user subscriptions'

steps.title: Auth & Security Layer
steps.description: Implement enterprise-grade authentication so you can start onboarding paying users immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure secure authentication routes and middleware for Next.js, ensuring protected pages redirect to login.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'implement protected routes with auth middleware'

steps.title: API Endpoint Scaffolding
steps.description: Create the backend logic necessary to handle incoming requests and business operations.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a set of CRUD API endpoints for managing user project tasks with error handling and logging.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'generate crud api endpoints for tasks'

steps.title: Frontend UI Integration
steps.description: Connect your backend to a polished UI to create the final user-facing experience.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a responsive dashboard component that fetches data from the tasks API and displays it in a clean table layout.

pro_tips: Always define your 'Definition of Done' in your Antigravity prompt to prevent the AI from over-engineering features.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store architectural decisions so you don't repeat yourself across sessions.
Prioritize building the payment flow before the decorative UI elements to validate revenue potential early.
Review all generated code for security vulnerabilities; treat the AI as a junior developer, not a senior architect.
Automate your git commits via Claude Code to maintain a clean, professional commit history for your future investors.
content.next_steps: Once your MVP is functional, deploy to Vercel or Railway and begin your first round of user testing to gather feedback for your next iteration.
content.conversion_block: Don't spend another day trapped in the cycle of tutorials. You have the tools and the roadmap to ship a product that generates real value. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
